active.title: Webhook delivery delays
active.summary: Webhook deliveries are recovering after a queue backlog caused elevated delivery latency.

updates.body: We are investigating increased delivery latency for outbound webhooks.
A worker pool fell behind after a burst of retry traffic. Extra capacity is online.
Delivery latency is trending down and queued events are draining normally.

recent.title: Dashboard sign-in errors
recent.summary: A bad cache key caused intermittent dashboard sign-in failures for a subset of users.

updates.body: We are investigating reports of intermittent dashboard sign-in failures.
The cache key issue has been corrected and sign-ins are back to normal.
